mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.model_number, p.material_number, p.hot_stamping_paper_type, p.descirption, p.paizi, p.fengdu, p.danwei, p.is_changyong, p.is_jiehuo, p.gaishu, p.status, lgn.company_number, lgn.gp_no, s.color, s.color_num, s.tightness, s.performance, s.size, s.temperature_range, s.project_id, pr.price FROM products p LEFT JOIN leo_gp_numbers lgn ON p.id = lgn.project_id LEFT JOIN specifications s ON p.id = s.project_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT price FROM pricing WHERE project_id = p.id ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 ) pr ON true ORDER BY p.id DESC

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.model_number, p.material_number, p.hot_stamping_paper_type, p.descirption, p.paizi, p.fengdu, p.danwei, p.is_changyong, p.is_jiehuo, p.gaishu, p.status, lgn.company_number, lgn.gp_no, s.color, s.color_num, s.tightness, s.performance, s.size, s.temperature_range, s.project_id, pr.price FROM products p LEFT JOIN leo_gp_numbers lgn ON p.id = lgn.project_id LEFT JOIN specifications s ON p.id = s.project_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT price FROM pricing WHERE project_id = p.id ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 ) pr ON true WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.model_number, p.material_number, p.hot_stamping_paper_type, p.descirption, p.paizi, p.fengdu, p.danwei, p.is_changyong, p.is_jiehuo, p.gaishu, p.status, lgn.company_number, lgn.gp_no, s.color, s.color_num, s.tightness, s.performance, s.size, s.temperature_range, s.project_id, pr.price FROM products p LEFT JOIN leo_gp_numbers lgn ON p.id = lgn.project_id LEFT JOIN specifications s ON p.id = s.project_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT price FROM pricing WHERE project_id = p.id ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 ) pr ON true WHERE p.material_number = #{materialNumber} ORDER BY p.id DESC

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.model_number, p.material_number, p.hot_stamping_paper_type, p.descirption, p.paizi, p.fengdu, p.danwei, p.is_changyong, p.is_jiehuo, p.gaishu, p.status, lgn.company_number, lgn.gp_no, s.color, s.color_num, s.tightness, s.performance, s.size, s.temperature_range, s.project_id, pr.price FROM products p LEFT JOIN leo_gp_numbers lgn ON p.id = lgn.project_id LEFT JOIN specifications s ON p.id = s.project_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT price FROM pricing WHERE project_id = p.id ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 ) pr ON true WHERE p.model_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{modelNumber}, '%') ORDER BY p.id DESC

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.model_number, p.material_number, p.hot_stamping_paper_type, p.descirption, p.paizi, p.fengdu, p.danwei, p.is_changyong, p.is_jiehuo, p.gaishu, p.status, lgn.company_number, lgn.gp_no, s.color, s.color_num, s.tightness, s.performance, s.size, s.temperature_range, s.project_id, pr.price FROM products p LEFT JOIN leo_gp_numbers lgn ON p.id = lgn.project_id LEFT JOIN specifications s ON p.id = s.project_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT price FROM pricing WHERE project_id = p.id ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 ) pr ON true WHERE lgn.company_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{companyNumber}, '%') ORDER BY p.id DESC

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.model_number, p.material_number, p.hot_stamping_paper_type, p.descirption, p.paizi, p.fengdu, p.danwei, p.is_changyong, p.is_jiehuo, p.gaishu, p.status, lgn.company_number, lgn.gp_no, s.color, s.color_num, s.tightness, s.performance, s.size, s.temperature_range, s.project_id, pr.price FROM products p LEFT JOIN leo_gp_numbers lgn ON p.id = lgn.project_id LEFT JOIN specifications s ON p.id = s.project_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT price FROM pricing WHERE project_id = p.id ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 ) pr ON true WHERE lgn.gp_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{gpNo}, '%') ORDER BY p.id DESC

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.model_number, p.material_number, p.hot_stamping_paper_type, p.descirption, p.paizi, p.fengdu, p.danwei, p.is_changyong, p.is_jiehuo, p.gaishu, p.status, lgn.company_number, lgn.gp_no, s.color, s.color_num, s.tightness, s.performance, s.size, s.temperature_range, s.project_id, pr.price FROM products p LEFT JOIN leo_gp_numbers lgn ON p.id = lgn.project_id LEFT JOIN specifications s ON p.id = s.project_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT price FROM pricing WHERE project_id = p.id ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 ) pr ON true WHERE p.hot_stamping_paper_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{hotStampingPaperType}, '%') ORDER BY p.id DESC
